raw_consumer_statement: I RECEIVED OVER {$300.00} IN FRAUDULANT CHARGES ON MY CITICARD MASTERCARD CREDIT CARD ON XXXX XXXX FOR PURCHASES MADE FROM XXXX XXXX. I DID NOT MAKE THESE PURCHASES AND I HAVE PROVIDED CITICARD WITH PROOF THAT I FILED MY TAXES WITH XXXX XXXX XXXX  12 DAYS PRIOR TO THE DATE OF THE FRAUDULANT XXXX PURCHASES WITHOUT THE USE OF ANY TAX PREPARATION SOFTWARE. AS OF THIS DATE CITICARD INDICATES MY DISPUTES ARE STILL UNDER INVESTIGATION EVEN THOUGH I HAVE PROVIDED THEM A COPY OF MY SIGNED FEDERAL TAX RETURN AS PROOF THAT I HAVE FILED MY INCOME TAXES 12 DAYS PRIOR TO THE PURCHASES APPEARING ON MY CREDIT CARD. EVERYTIME I CALL THEM ABOUT THIS MATTER THEY TELL ME THAT THE DISPUTED CHARGES ARE UNDER INVESTIGATION EVEN THOUGH I HAVE PROVIDED THEM PROOF THAT I FILED MY TAXES 12 DAYS PRIOR TO THE FRAUDULANT PURCHASES. ALSO WHY WOULD ANYONE MAKE MULTIPLE PURCHASES OF THE SAME PRODUCT? COMMON SENSE SHOULD TELL THEM THAT THESE PURCHASES ARE FRAUDULANT.
